quotes.title: Building for a thriving ecosystem
quotes.quote: We built our whole business on the notion of working with a thriving partner ecosystem. We're very motivated to make sure that we're not just building a product portfolio that solves our customer's problems, but that enables our partners to be successful as well.

quotes.title: Data moats in the AI era
quotes.quote: Platforms with data moats like Hubspot will continue to thrive. I'd add that the same logic applies to everything inside those platforms. If you're an app or a service that exists as a feature on top of someone else's data, ask yourself whether AI makes you more valuable—or redundant.

author.name: Sandhya Hegde
author.role: CEO and Founder of Calibre Labs

quotes.title: Platforms should earn your commitment
quotes.quote: The State of Ecosystems report looks at the intersection of trust, context, and proof as the foundation of a successful partner ecosystem, drawing on HubSpot's breadth of partners, depth of relationships, and track record of translating platform capability into customer outcomes. The data points to a very rare convergence, the right platform, the right moment, and the right market.

author.name: Zack Kass
author.role: AI Futurist, Author, Keynote Speaker, and the former Head of Go-to-Market at OpenAI
